message: ci: align go version with go.mod

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,8 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
-          go-version: '1.22'
+          # Keep CI aligned with the Go toolchain defined in go.mod
+          go-version-file: go.mod
       - name: Go fmt
         run: |
           diff=$(gofmt -l ./)
